title: Why did the MPEs grow faces
display_title: Why did the MPEs grow faces
wikitext:
[]: Why did the MPEs grow faces?             Quote Post by hwdge » Thu Dec 27, 2012 3:39 pm I searched all over and never figured out why this happened, is it because of Shinji's insanity or did they actually grow faces? Thanks in advance for any answers

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Dec 27, 2012 3:44 pm They actually did grow faces. It was a side effect of synchronizing with Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Thu Dec 27, 2012 3:47 pm I'm guessing you mean the Rei faces? Yes, they are physical- Shinji does see them in reality. There are people who can explain it a lot better than me, but I think it is all to do with GNR (Giant Naked Rei, or Lillith if you prefer) and their 'unification'. EDIT: whoops, riffraff beat me to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 27, 2012 3:51 pm The harpies grew faces when Giant Naked Adam/Lilith hybrid being infected all Adamic matter, and subsumed it. Like the little legs growing from Lilith's torso only creepier.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Dec 27, 2012 4:01 pm Fuyutsuki mentions something about them beginning to "absorb" or "synchronize" with Rei for the sake of TI. That probably involves growing faces. Also, the universe conspiring to make Shinji uncomfortable about every single romantic and/or sexual thought he ever had about Rei. If any of the previous schocking revelations about her origins wasn't enough, now he'll always think of the things that ate Asuka whenever he tries to picture Rei's gently smiling face. He probably can't help still finding these faces slightly pretty when they're full of holes and plastered across the visages of those absolutely repulsing monsters. Hence, that "AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAH! Does not compute. Bluescreen. Please reboot." -reaction. The audience was probably meant to experience a similar effect.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Dec 27, 2012 5:00 pm Kendrix wrote: Also, the universe conspiring to make Shinji uncomfortable about every single romantic and/or sexual thought he ever had about Rei. If any of the previous schocking revelations about her origins wasn't enough, now he'll always think of the things that ate Asuka whenever he tries to picture Rei's gently smiling face.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Thu Dec 27, 2012 9:55 pm Because Anno was looking for some of the creepiest imagery involving Yui/Rei/Lillith's face, and settled on those faces growing out of the dickhead EVAs. Seriously, it was like their faces were foreskins or something. I realize that's a disgusting comparison, and I do not apologize. But yeah, in-universe there was some technobabble involving Lilith synchronizing with the EVA units and taking over their systems.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 28, 2012 4:07 am CyberXIII wrote: Seriously, it was like their faces were foreskins or something. I realize that's a disgusting comparison, and I do not apologize.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Fri Dec 28, 2012 5:13 am Oh God, it's even worse in gif form, like some sort of weird, twisted masturbation. I do remember seeing some storyboards of Rebuild 2.0 where the GNR that was formed of Zeruel's blood was supposed to lick Unit-01's core, so I guess 3 rd impact is supposed to be filled with sexual metaphors.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Dec 28, 2012 2:00 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sat Dec 29, 2012 1:23 am I had never thought of that!

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Dec 29, 2012 3:42 pm Sharaz Destler wrote: I had never thought of that!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Dec 29, 2012 4:27 pm That's just sad, having never seen the beauty that is a complete penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Dec 29, 2012 4:55 pm TehDonutKing wrote: That's just sad, having never seen the beauty that is a complete penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 29, 2012 5:12 pm TOPIC, BITCHES This is supposed to be about the harpies, not about how much you crave the cock.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Dec 29, 2012 5:34 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Topic, please. This is supposed to be about the harpies, not about your love of penises.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Dec 30, 2012 11:50 pm Mr. Tines wrote: This is supposed to be about the harpies, not about how much you crave the cock.

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Dec 31, 2012 1:49 am Alternatively, they just did it because they wanted to.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Dec 31, 2012 1:35 pm I don't think I'm going to be able to unsee that GIF, Mr. Tines. Anywho, Harpies! That scene was indeed immensely creepy, and stung of the Adam/Lilith fusion concept that we heard so mush about. Why they grew faces , I am unsure; all I know is that it wasn't an illusion. It did have the added factor of making my friend perform the technicolor yawn all over his sneakers, and that was amusing.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Dec 31, 2012 7:16 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: It did have the added factor of making my friend perform the technicolor yawn all over his sneakers, and that was amusing.
